keywords.name: I am Ishebad the chosen.
keywords.time: Time does not matter to the undead.
keywords.temple: The temple will take care of your spiritual matters.
keywords.pharaoh: The pharaoh wants not to be disturbed. I am his grand vizier and responsible for the daily affairs of the city and promotions of heroes.
keywords.ashmunrah: The fallen pharaoh did not see it was time to step back and let his son rule. So he met the fate that he deserved.
keywords.scarab: The scarabs are keepers of secrets. Some secrets are not ment for your mortals. Ever keep that in mind.
keywords.tibia: This world just awaits the wisdom of our pharaoh. It needs that wisdom and will soon learn to appreciate it.
keywords.carlin: Other cities are of no importance. Ankrahmun will become the center of the known world anyways.
keywords.thais: Other cities are of no importance. Ankrahmun will become the center of the known world anyways.
keywords.edron: Other cities are of no importance. Ankrahmun will become the center of the known world anyways.
keywords.venore: Other cities are of no importance. Ankrahmun will become the center of the known world anyways.
keywords.kazordoon: Other cities are of no importance. Ankrahmun will become the center of the known world anyways.
keywords.ab'dendriel: Other cities are of no importance. Ankrahmun will become the center of the known world anyways.
keywords.darama: The rule of our beloved pharaoh will soon spread this continent and one day the whole known world.
keywords.darashia: This village is so insignificant that our wise pharaoh has choosen to ignore it.
keywords.daraman: Some lunatic who was driven mad by the heat of the desert and dehydration.
keywords.Ankrahmun: Our city will become the capital of a worldwide empire.
keywords.Arkhothep: The pharaoh wants not to be disturbed. I am his grand vizier and responsible for the daily affairs of the city and promotions of heroes.
keywords.job: The pharaoh wants not to be disturbed. I am his grand vizier and responsible for the daily affairs of the city and promotions of heroes.
keywords.mortality: If you please our pharaoh, he will reward you and free you from your mortality.
keywords.ascension: Consult a priest to learn how you could achieve ascension.

keywords.Rah: Consult a priest to learn how you could achieve ascension.
keywords.uthun: Consult a priest to learn how you could achieve ascension.
keywords.undead: Undeath is only for the choosen.
keywords.undeath: Undeath is only for the choosen.
keywords.mourn: You mortals are all to be mourned for your miserable existance.
keywords.promot: Do you want to be promoted in your vocation for 20000 gold?
keywords.eremo: It is said that he lives on a small island near Edron. Maybe the people there know more about him.

texts: The pharaoh wants not to be disturbed. I am his grand vizier and responsible for the daily affairs of the city and promotions of heroes.

entries.response: You need to be at least level 20 in order to be promoted.
